zh.lifeSummary: 當Nils Arfwidsson於1500年出生在瑞典達拉納格朗亞德時，他的父親Arfwid Arvid Mattsson40歲，母親Britta Iversdotter18歲。他和Guri Rasmusdatter至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1560年在瑞典達拉納白享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Nils

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

historicEvents.title: Sweden Becomes Lutheran Nation
historicEvents.description: Sweden officially declared itself a Lutheran nation in 1544.

en.lifeSummary: When Nils Arfwidsson was born in 1500, in Grangärde, Dalarna, Sweden, his father, Arfwid Arvid Mattsson, was 40 and his mother, Britta Iversdotter, was 18. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Guri Rasmusdatter. He died in 1560, in By, Dalarna, Sweden, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nils Arfwidsson est né en 1500, à Grangärde, Dalarna, Suède, son père, Arfwid Arvid Mattsson, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Britta Iversdotter, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Guri Rasmusdatter. Il est décédé en 1560, à By, Dalarna, Suède, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nils Arfwidsson 1500 in Grangärde, Dalarna, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arfwid Arvid Mattsson 40 und seine Mutter Britta Iversdotter 18. Er hatte mit Guri Rasmusdatter mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1560 im Alter von 60 Jahren in By, Dalarna, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Arfwidsson è nato il nel 1500 nel Grangärde, Dalarna, Svezia, il suo padre, Arfwid Arvid Mattsson, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Britta Iversdotter, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Guri Rasmusdatter. Morì nel 1560, nel By, Dalarna, Svezia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nils Arfwidssonが1500年にスウェーデンダラーナグラングaルドで生まれた時，父Arfwid Arvid Mattssonは40歳，母Britta Iversdotterは18歳であった。彼はGuri Rasmusdatterとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1560年にスウェーデンダラーナビーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nils Arfwidsson(이)가 1500년 스웨덴 다라른아 그랑a르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arfwid Arvid Mattsson(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Britta Iversdotter(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Guri Rasmusdatter(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 스웨덴 다라른아 비에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Arfwidsson nasceu em 1500, em Grangärde, Dalarna, Suécia, seu pai, Arfwid Arvid Mattsson, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Britta Iversdotter, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Guri Rasmusdatter. Ele faleceu em 1560, em By, Dalarna, Suécia, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nils Arfwidsson родился в 1500 г. в местности грангaрд, даларна, Швеция, его отцу по имени Arfwid Arvid Mattsson было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Britta Iversdotter, 18. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Guri Rasmusdatter. Он умер в 1560 г. в местности би, даларна, Швеция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nils Arfwidsson nació en 1500, en Grangärde, Dalarna, Suecia, su papá, Arfwid Arvid Mattsson, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Britta Iversdotter, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Guri Rasmusdatter. Murió en 1560, en By, Dalarna, Suecia, a la edad de 60 años.
